label: Data collection site (Florida, Williams, HongKong, Illinois, Yale)
Stimulus presented in the trial (words or faces)
Category of the stimulus (Image vs. Text)
Type of stimulus (Bob vs. non-Bob vs positive vs. negative)
Correct response in the trial (d vs. k)
Key pressed by the participant in the trial (d vs. k vs. ['d', 'k'] vs. ['k', 'd'])
Whether the participant's first response in the trial was correct (correct vs. error)
Response time in seconds for the participant's first response in the trial
Response time in seconds until correct response (0 if the participant responded correctly on the first response)
Combination of categories in the IAT (1 = Combination 1: Bob = negative in Block 3 & 4 vs. 2 = Combination 2: Bob = negative in Block 6 & 7)
Valence of behavior description and briefly flashed words in block (1 = Positive behavior/negative flashed words in first block vs. 2 = Negative behavior/positive flashed words in first block)
Order of attitude measures (1 = Implicit-explicit vs. 2 = Explicit-implicit)
